comment: [new] Барка на одном из тел у Ктанового орудия боли

languages.text: Тела жестоко изувечены — одни обгорели, другие изрублены на куски. Некоторые раны нанесены посмертно.

traits.locale_text: Тела жестоко изувечены — одни обгорели, другие изрублены на куски. Некоторые раны нанесены посмертно.
Тела жестоко изувечены — одни обгорели, другие изрублены на куски. Некоторые раны нанесены посмертно.

languages.text: The bodies are mangled — some have been burned, others were chopped into pieces. Some wounds were inflicted posthumously.
languages.original_text: Тела жестоко изувечены — одни обгорели, другие изрублены на куски. Некоторые раны нанесены посмертно.

traits.locale_text: The bodies are mangled — some have been burned, others were chopped into pieces. Some wounds were inflicted posthumously.
The bodies are mangled — some have been burned, others were chopped into pieces. Some wounds were inflicted posthumously.
The bodies are mangled — some have been burned, others were chopped into pieces. Some wounds were inflicted posthumously.

languages.text: Die Leichen sind verstümmelt — einige wurden verbrannt, andere wurden in Stücke gehackt. Einige Wunden wurden ihnen posthum zugefügt.
languages.original_text: The bodies are mangled — some have been burned, others were chopped into pieces. Some wounds were inflicted posthumously.

languages.text: Les corps sont mutilés — certains ont été brûlés, d'autres ont été découpés en morceaux. Certaines blessures ont été infligées à titre posthume.
languages.original_text: The bodies are mangled — some have been burned, others were chopped into pieces. Some wounds were inflicted posthumously.

languages.text: 尸体残缺不全，有的被焚烧，有的被砍成碎块。有些伤口是死后造成的。
languages.original_text: The bodies are mangled — some have been burned, others were chopped into pieces. Some wounds were inflicted posthumously.

languages.text: Los cuerpos están destrozados: algunos han sido quemados, otros cortados en pedazos. Algunas heridas son póstumas.
languages.original_text: The bodies are mangled — some have been burned, others were chopped into pieces. Some wounds were inflicted posthumously.

languages.text: あるものは焼かれ、あるものは切り刻まれている。死後につけられた傷もある。
languages.original_text: The bodies are mangled — some have been burned, others were chopped into pieces. Some wounds were inflicted posthumously.

languages.text: Cesetler parçalanmış — bazıları yakılmış, diğerleri parçalara ayrılmış. Bazı yaralar ölümden sonra açılmış.
languages.original_text: The bodies are mangled — some have been burned, others were chopped into pieces. Some wounds were inflicted posthumously.
